metadata.author: Paul
metadata.subject: A Holy Life for the Church Life — Serving the Living God, Conducting Ourselves Holily, and Waiting for the Lord’s Coming.

1: For they themselves report concerning us what kind of entrance we had toward you and how you turned to God from the idols to serve a living and true God,
5: Always rejoice, unceasingly pray, in everything give thanks; for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus regarding you.
And the God of peace Himself sanctify you wholly, and may your spirit and soul and body be preserved complete, without blame, at the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ.

9.text: To serve a 'living' God means that the God we worship is subjective to us, directing our daily walk and being expressed through our living.

23.text: This verse clearly reveals that man is composed of three parts. God's sanctification begins from our spirit, spreads to our soul, and eventually reaches our physical body.
